name: Cluster Inventory Snapshot
description: Local JSON inventory exported from an asset system.

name: VictoriaMetrics HPCFund Cluster
description: Historical March 2026 cluster observability dataset for GPU compute nodes, Slurm state, InfiniBand, and ROCm telemetry.

queries.jobGpuUtilizationPeak: topk(20, max by(instance,jobid,user,partition) (max_over_time(rocm_utilization_percentage[7d]) * on(instance) group_left(jobid,user,partition) max by(instance,jobid,user,partition) (last_over_time(rmsjob_info{type="slurm"}[30d]))))
queries.jobGpuVramPeak: topk(20, max by(instance,jobid,user,partition) (max_over_time(rocm_vram_used_percentage[7d]) * on(instance) group_left(jobid,user,partition) max by(instance,jobid,user,partition) (last_over_time(rmsjob_info{type="slurm"}[30d]))))
queries.jobGpuOccupancyPeak: topk(20, max by(instance,jobid,user,partition) (max_over_time(rocm_compute_unit_occupancy[7d]) * on(instance) group_left(jobid,user,partition) max by(instance,jobid,user,partition) (last_over_time(rmsjob_info{type="slurm"}[30d]))))

name: Warehouse KPI Feed
description: Relational summary source stub; replace sample rows with a live driver.

name: Warehouse KPI Feed (DuckDB)
description: Local DuckDB sample database demonstrating the generic SQL datasource path.
schemaQuery: select table_schema, table_name from information_schema.tables where table_schema not in ('information_schema', 'pg_catalog') order by 1, 2 limit 50
columnsQuery: select table_schema, table_name, column_name, data_type from information_schema.columns where table_schema not in ('information_schema', 'pg_catalog') order by 1, 2, ordinal_position limit 200
previewQuery: select * from warehouse_kpis order by site limit 25
rowCountQuery: select count(*) as row_count from warehouse_kpis

name: Warehouse KPI Feed (SQLite)
description: Local SQLite sample database demonstrating the generic SQL datasource path.
schemaQuery: select name as table_name from sqlite_master where type = 'table' and name not like 'sqlite_%' order by 1 limit 50
previewQuery: select * from warehouse_kpis order by site limit 25
rowCountQuery: select count(*) as row_count from warehouse_kpis
